meta.project: Children and Young Adults Book Recommendation Platform

product_overview: A web platform that provides curated book recommendations for children and young adults by integrating the National Library's librarian recommendations and external search via Aladin Open API, aimed at enhancing user discovery and engagement with age-appropriate literature.
core_goals: Provide reliable and updated librarian recommended books from the National Library for Children and Young Adults.
Enable users to search a wide range of books using the Aladin Open API to extend discovery options beyond curated lists.
Ensure an intuitive and user-friendly interface for easy browsing and searching of books.
Allow access to book recommendations and search without requiring user authentication to maximize accessibility.
Ensure backend API endpoints are secure, performant, and reliable for a smooth user experience.
key_features: Librarian Books API integration fetching recommended books from the National Library for Children and Young Adults (NLCF).
Search API integration utilizing Aladin Open API for comprehensive book search functionality with pagination support.
Home page displaying both librarian and expert recommended books to facilitate user engagement.
Search results page showing books found via the Search API, with query input and results pagination.
Use of modern front-end technologies including Next.js, React, and TailwindCSS for responsive and accessible UI design.
Backend powered by TypeScript and Supabase ensuring secure data access and API management.
user_flow_summary: User lands on the Home page and views a curated list of librarian and expert recommended books.
User navigates to the Search page and enters a search query to find additional books.
The system calls the Search API with the user's query and optionally a page number to retrieve matching book results.
Search results are displayed with pagination to allow browsing through multiple pages of books.
Users can explore detailed book information through the listed results without needing to log in.
validation_criteria: Verify that API keys for all external services are valid and not expired.
Validate that all API endpoints return correct JSON responses when accessed directly.
Check database permissions ensuring anonymous users can read recommended books but no unauthorized modifications.
Test that all features function correctly end-to-end including retrieving, searching, and displaying books.
Ensure UI components render properly across multiple devices and browsers for consistent user experience.

features.name: Librarian Books API
features.description: Fetches recommended books from the National Library for Children and Young Adults (NLCF) API.

features.name: Search API
features.description: Searches for books using the Aladin Open API.

features.name: Frontend - Search Page
features.description: Search results page that displays books found via the Search API.

features.name: Frontend - Home Page
